resolved_findings.title: Semantic validator misses high/critical findings on risk-accepted disposition
resolved_findings.evidence: Fixed with validate_review_decision_semantics requiring accepted_risks for risk-accepted/risk_accepted decisions with high or critical severity, plus a negative regression test.

resolved_findings.title: Dead elif branch in validate_handoff_closure memory_files handling
resolved_findings.evidence: Resolved by collapsing memory_files handling to a single non-list check after the final Claude review.

resolved_findings.title: review-decision.json in the run dir is codex-authored, not produced by an external Claude Code review
resolved_findings.evidence: Resolved for provenance by invoking the real Claude Code review adapter and indexing claude-review.json, claude-review-evidence.json, and claude-review.raw.log.

resolved_findings.title: Schema permits empty source_evidence array
resolved_findings.evidence: Resolved by semantic validation requiring non-empty source_evidence for passed, findings-triaged, waived, risk-accepted, and blocked review decisions while preserving unavailable/process-failed exceptions.

resolved_findings.title: load_indexed_review_decision silently picks the first review-decision.json by basename
resolved_findings.evidence: Resolved by detecting and rejecting duplicate indexed review-decision.json evidence entries during review-decision loading.

resolved_findings.title: severity_counts is self-reported and not cross-validated against review content
resolved_findings.evidence: Resolved for calculable sources by comparing severity_counts against findings[] counts in linked review-output or review-evidence artifacts, skipping only sources whose findings cannot be computed.

not_tested: explicit advance_run coverage for every non-required REVIEW_DECISION_TARGETS branch
steady-state validate enforcement of completed-run handoff frontmatter
residual_risks: handoff closure is enforced by advance -> completed, not by steady-state validate, to preserve the no-migration contract for historical runs.
review-decision requiredness is scoped to reviewed/review_blocked; other review-related states reuse Phase 1 evidence contracts.
notes: Real Claude Code review completed with status findings. The prior medium finding was fixed and re-reviewed; follow-up validation hardening closed the source_evidence, duplicate-decision, and severity_counts provenance gaps. The linked review-output severity_counts remain unchanged because they count the original Claude review findings.
